text: One of the cloudiest cities in the world is **Tórshavn**, the capital of the Faroe Islands. It averages over 840 hours of sunshine **per year**, meaning it is cloudy or overcast most of the time. In the United States, **Seattle, Washington**, and **Juneau, Alaska** are among the cloudiest cities, but Tórshavn is often considered the most consistently cloudy, with skies rarely clear.
